title: Bee Blessing
description: Enhance your farming with helpful bees! Nearby bees will automatically assist crop growth, accelerating the maturation process with beautiful particle effects. Watch as your crops grow faster with the power of bee magic.
body:
🐝 Boost Your Farm with Magical Bees! 🌱✨

Bring some buzzing helpers to your fields! Nearby bees will:

🌿 Speed up crop growth automatically

✨ Fill the air with beautiful particle effects as they work their magic

Sit back and watch your farm flourish faster than ever with the power of bee magic! 🍯💛

For support or inquiries, message me on discord:
procurer
